metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins that streamline the OpenCell developer workflow — from Jira ticket management and UI scaffolding to automated commits, pull requests, and code review, with built-in integrations for Atlassian, Bitbucket, Figma, and Playwright.

plugins.name: oc-review-front-code
plugins.description: Review React and Node.js code for bugs, security, performance, and best practices

plugins.name: oc-figma-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to Figma MCP server to extract design context, generate code from designs, and retrieve design tokens

plugins.name: oc-bitbucket-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to Bitbucket MCP server to create pull requests, manage repositories, and review code

plugins.name: oc-playwright-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to Playwright MCP server to automate browser interactions, take screenshots, and test web applications

plugins.name: oc-cache-jira
plugins.description: Fetch and cache JIRA ticket data locally for use by other OpenCell commands

plugins.name: oc-commit
plugins.description: Commit changes using JIRA ticket ID and summary from cache with automatic code review

plugins.name: oc-pull-request
plugins.description: Push changes and create a pull request for a JIRA ticket with automatic squash and PR creation

plugins.name: oc-create-ui
plugins.description: Create UI page from JIRA ticket ID using the frontend-engineer sub-agent

plugins.name: oc-frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Expert React/TypeScript UI engineer sub-agent for building, refactoring, and architecting frontend components

plugins.name: oc-frontend-reviewer
plugins.description: Frontend code reviewer sub-agent for validating React/TypeScript code against project standards

plugins.name: oc-frontend-designer
plugins.description: Frontend designer sub-agent for translating Figma designs into implementation-ready React/MUI components with design tokens and styling

plugins.name: oc-cypress-expert
plugins.description: Cypress testing expert sub-agent for end-to-end testing, test automation, and flaky test resolution

plugins.name: oc-fix-bug
plugins.description: Fix a bug from a JIRA ticket: update status, create fix branch, and start fixing

plugins.name: oc-review-pr
plugins.description: Review a pull request linked to a JIRA ticket using the frontend-reviewer agent with a detailed report and suggested fixes

plugins.name: oc-opencell-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to the Opencell billing system via MCP to manage invoices, quotes, customers, payments, subscriptions, dunning, and all billing operations

plugins.name: oc-core-reviewer
plugins.description: Backend code reviewer sub-agent for validating Java/EJB/JPA/Liquibase code against Opencell core project standards

plugins.name: oc-sonar-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to SonarQube MCP server to access code quality metrics, issues, and analysis results

plugins.name: oc-postgres-mcp
plugins.description: Connect to PostgreSQL via MCP for database health analysis, index tuning, query optimization, and safe SQL execution
